Bus Timings

Bus 202 Timetable Al Rahba Hospital to Abu Dhabi Bus Station

October 31, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Reg Bus 202 is a vital part of Abu Dhabi’s public transportation network, connecting Al Rahbah, Al Yaseer Street/Al Rahba Hospital to Al Nahyan, Abu Dhabi Bus Station. This route serves both residents and visitors, offering a reliable, affordable travel option through key areas of the city. Whether you’re commuting to work, visiting landmarks, or running errands, Bus 202 provides convenient access to essential destinations across Abu Dhabi.

Operational Details

Bus 202 operates with regular intervals throughout the day, ensuring convenience for both early risers and late travelers.

From Al Rahba Hospital From Abu Dhabi Bus Station
05:18 06:25
06:20 07:27
07:20 08:27
08:19 09:26
09:20 10:27
10:20 11:27
11:18 12:25
12:18 13:25
13:18 14:25
14:18 15:25
15:17 16:24
16:18 17:25
17:18 18:25
18:18 19:25
19:18 20:25
20:18 21:25
21:18 22:25
22:18 23:25

Download PDF Bus 202

Bus 202 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official AD Mobility website, or follow this link to access the 202 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing:

  • Cash Ticket: AED 8.00

  • Sayer Ticket: AED 6.00

Passengers can purchase tickets using cash or the Hafilat Smart Card, which can be topped up at various locations across Abu Dhabi. For more details on fare options and locations to top up, visit the Abu Dhabi Department of Transport’s website.

Route Overview

Reg Bus 202 starts its journey at Al Rahbah, Al Yaseer Street, and makes several stops before reaching Abu Dhabi Bus Station. Key locations along the route include:

  1. Al Rahba Hospital The starting point of the route, serving residents and visitors.

  2. Abu Al Darda Mosque A peaceful stop for those visiting this mosque.

  3. Al Wahda Sport Club Academy A stop for sports enthusiasts.

  4. Federal Government Office Serves passengers heading to government offices.

  5. Badr Haji Mosque Another prominent mosque along the route.

  6. Al Shahama Park A green escape for families and visitors.

  7. Al Mirsal Street A central road providing easy access to surrounding areas.

  8. Emirates Park Zoo A stop for families and tourists.

  9. Al Shahama School Key stop for students and educational purposes.

  10. F1 Assembly Point A transit point for various commuters.

  11. Al Widayhi Street Another key stop connecting residential areas.

  12. Deerfields Mall A popular shopping destination.

  13. ADNOC Serving those working or visiting this leading energy company.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Al Khawarizmi International College A significant educational institution.

  2. Al Bahya Park A recreational stop for residents.

  3. Al Naham Street A busy residential and commercial area.

  4. Souq A lively market area for shopping.

  5. Hazaa Bin Zayed Mosque A prominent religious stop.

  6. Emirates Tower An important business hub.

  7. Fatimah Bint Mubarak Street A key commercial street.

  8. Madinat Zayed Shopping Centre A major retail center.

  9. Mariam Bint Said Mosque A peaceful stop near the mosque.

  10. Abu Dhabi Bus Station The final stop, offering connectivity to other bus routes.

Some other Abu Dhabi bus routes you can check out include the 300 bus route, which runs from Capital Park to Al Shamkha Makani Mall, and the 407 route, which goes from Ghurair Al Ojaan Mosque to Al Raha Shopping Centre.

Accessibility Features

Reg Bus 202 is designed with accessibility in mind, featuring ramps, priority seating for differently-abled passengers, and audio-visual aids for those with hearing or vision impairments. This ensures a comfortable and inclusive travel experience for all passengers.

Nearby Attractions

  • Emirates Park Zoo

  • Deerfields Mall
  • Hazaa Bin Zayed Mosque
  • Madinat Zayed Shopping Centre
  • Abu Dhabi Bus Station

Journey Experience

A trip on Bus 202 from Al Rahba Hospital to Abu Dhabi Bus Station offers passengers a long and scenic journey through the city. Starting in the quieter outskirts near Al Rahba, the route gradually moves into more urbanized areas, passing through key residential and commercial districts.

The journey also provides convenient access to several local attractions, healthcare facilities, and bustling markets, giving a well-rounded view of Abu Dhabi’s diverse landscape. Whether commuting for work or leisure, this route ensures a smooth connection between the suburbs and the city center.

Travel Tips

To make your trip more enjoyable, consider traveling during off-peak hours to avoid crowds. Stay updated on real-time schedules and any route changes by downloading the Abu Dhabi Department of Transport app. Additionally, keeping your Hafilat Smart Card topped up will ensure a hassle-free experience.

Reg Bus 202 is an essential route for those looking to navigate Abu Dhabi efficiently and affordably. With well-placed stops and frequent service, it caters to both daily commuters and occasional travelers. Whether you’re heading to work, visiting landmarks, or simply exploring the city, Bus 202 offers a convenient, eco-friendly option for getting around.

For more information on schedules and route details, visit the official resources provided by the Abu Dhabi Department of Transport, and check out the comprehensive guide on the Full Abu Dhabi Bus Routes for further route options across the city.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: October 31, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
